title: 10 years, 10 presidents. Peru’s leaders don’t last. Voters will try again.
summary_full: Elections on Sunday offer Peruvians another once-in-five-years chance to set the nation on a new path. All signs suggest they won’t.
summary_public: Elections on Sunday offer Peruvians another once-in-five-years chance to set the nation on a new path. All signs suggest they won’t.
